description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched, multi-layered gable roof featuring pronounced overhangs and a decorative ridge beam. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally laid wooden planks, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. A single wooden door is centered on the front facade, flanked by a small, square window on the rear side. The roof is composed of overlapping wooden shingles, adding texture and depth to the structure. Surrounding the cabin is a simple, curved wooden fence, which partially encloses the front and sides. The overall design evokes a traditional, hand-built aesthetic suitable for rural or forested settings.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, wooden plank walls, and a curved wooden fence partially enclosing the front. The structure features a single front door and a small rear window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the centered wooden door, steep gable roof, and the curved wooden fence enclosing the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered wooden shingles of the roof and the fence curving along the side; no doors or windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small, square window and the intricate roof structure, with the fence visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's overhang and shingle detail, with the fence curving along this side as well.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with layered wooden shingles and decorative ridge beam, pronounced overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: single small square window centered on the rear facade, no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: single wooden door centered on the front facade
